title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive, Hon. Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Sign a Memorandum of Agreement with DOH Center for Health Development 4a (CALABARZON) for the Transfer of One Covid-19 Allowance (OCA) and Its Distribution to Eligible Health and Non-health Care Workers As Guided by Dbm-doh Joint Circular No. 2022-0001. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 05/27/22)
